task: Find me the most viewed refridgerator that is 34-36 inches wide, with stainless steel finish, and has a customer review rating of 4 stars or higher
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to US Appliance’s refrigerator category page, applied the stainless steel filter, applied the 36-inch width filter (the site’s available width facet within the requested 34–36 inch range), applied rating filters for 4, 4.5, and 5 stars, and then sorted the filtered results by “Most Viewed.” The resulting page showed the sort control set to “Most Viewed,” and the first product in the filtered list was Frigidaire FRSS2623AS. The agent opened that product page and verified key details: stainless steel finish, rating 4.4/5 with 11,771 reviews, and width details on the product page. This satisfies the task of finding the most viewed refrigerator matching the requested constraints.
final_result_response:
I found the top match after filtering for stainless steel, 36-inch width class, 4+ star rating, then sorting by “Most Viewed”:

**Frigidaire FRSS2623AS 36" Side-by-Side Refrigerator**
- **Finish:** Stainless Steel
- **Rating:** 4.4 out of 5 stars, **11,771 reviews**
- **Width:** Listed as 36", specs show **35 7/8" cabinet width** and 36 1/8" overall width
- **Price shown:** $1,253.00
- **Link:** https://www.us-appliance.com/frss2623as.html

This was the first result under “Most Viewed” with the selected filters.
action_history: Opening US Appliance: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.us-appliance.com/');
Applying stainless steel filter: await page.locator('e65').click();
Trying CSS click for stainless filter: await page.locator('ul[data-name="finish-color.filter"] li[data-key="stainless steel"] label').click({force:true});
Applying 36-inch width filter: await page.locator('ul[data-name="width-inches.filter"] li[data-key="36"] label').click({force:true});
Expanding width filter options: await page.locator('e356').click();
Applying 36-inch width filter: await page.locator('ul[data-name="width-inches.filter"] li[data-key="36"] label').click({force:true});
Applying 4 stars and higher rating filters: await loc.click({force:true});
Opening top most-viewed product: await page.locator('e839').click();
